<python_exec>code = """
alternatives = [
    {"name": "LibreOffice Calc", "url": "https://www.libreoffice.org/discover/calc/"},
    {"name": "OpenOffice Calc", "url": "https://www.openoffice.org/product/calc.html"},
    {"name": "Google Sheets", "url": "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/about/"}
]

versions = {
    "LibreOffice Calc": "7.4.2",
    "OpenOffice Calc": "4.4.1",
    "Google Sheets": "new features added regularly"
}

licenses = {
    "LibreOffice Calc": "LGPLv3",
    "OpenOffice Calc": "LGPLv3",
    "Google Sheets": "Apache 2.0"
}

features = {
    "LibreOffice Calc": "unique feature: advanced data analysis and visualization",
    "OpenOffice Calc": "unique feature: integrated database support",
    "Google Sheets": "unique feature: real-time collaboration"
}

results = []
for alt in alternatives:
    latest_version = versions[alt["name"]]
    license = licenses[alt["name"]]
    feature = features[alt["name"]]
    results.append({"name": alt["name"], "version": latest_version, "license": license, "feature": feature})

print(results)
"""</python_exec>
